Video.summary: A young boy's camaraderie with wild animals comes in handy when he sets out to avenge his father's death.
Video.title: Call of the Forest

Video.summary: Hopalong Cassidy rides shotgun for a freight company and comes up against a gang of outlaws posing as cavalrymen.
Video.title: Doomed Caravan

Video.summary: A singing cowboy (Roy Rogers) helps a slain rancher's daughter (Ruth Terry) breed horses for the Army.
Video.title: Hands Across the Border

Video.summary: A cowboy (John Wayne) romances a pretty woman (Marion Burns) while tracking the outlaw gang that killed his father.
Video.title: The Dawn Rider

Video.summary: A gunsmith (Lane Chandler) offers to fix outlaws' guns if they release their hostage to him.
Video.title: Hurricane Horseman

Video.summary: A boy raised by his servant vows to take revenge on the ranchers who killed his parents.
Video.title: Fighting Fury

Video.summary: A saloon singer (Ann Dvorak) and her rival like a marshal (Randolph Scott) who cleans up a drunken sheriff's (Edgar Buchanan) cow town.
Video.title: Abilene Town

Video.summary: Buffalo Bill (Roy Rogers) and the cavalry protect mining surveyors from Indians in New Mexico.
Video.title: Young Buffalo Bill

Video.summary: A French girl (Lily Damita) joins a wagon train from Missouri led by two scouts and their young partner (Gary Cooper).
Video.title: Fighting Caravans

Video.summary: An ex-army officer accidentally kills a woman's son and tries to make up for it.
Video.title: The Deadly Companions

Video.summary: A tungsten miner (Bill Boyd) loves his father's rival's daughter (Helen Twelvetrees) and fights off her other suitor (Clark Gable).
Video.title: The Painted Desert

Video.summary: Billy the Kid (Buster Crabbe) stages a shootout with outlaws who have transformed an innocent young lady into a wanted desperado.
Video.title: Fugitive of the Plains

Video.summary: Two former Pony Express riders enter a dilapidated stagecoach in a race for a government mail contract.
Video.title: Winds of the Wasteland

Video.summary: Annie relies on Tagg's ability as a ventriloquist to save an innocent stage driver from angry townspeople.
Video.title: Outlaw Mesa

Video.summary: Annie and Tagg (Gail Davis, Jimmy Hawkins) track a masked bandit who holds up an acrobatic troupe. With Brad Johnson.
Video.title: Sharpshooting Annie

Video.summary: Annie (Gail Davis) plays matchmaker for her friend Bess Murdock (Nancy Hale). With Don Kennedy, Brad Johnson.
Video.title: Annie Makes a Marriage

Video.summary: The railroad president decides to scrap the Cannonball himself.
Video.title: The President Who Came to Dinner

Image.alt: The President Who Came to Dinner
The President Who Came to Dinner
The President Who Came to Dinner
The President Who Came to Dinner
The President Who Came to Dinner

Video.summary: Kate wants to hide the Hooterville Cannonball to save it from the scrap heap.
Video.title: Quick, Hide the Railroad

Video.summary: Annie uses the town's new fire engine to capture some bank robbers who are hiding in a shack near town.
Video.title: The Iron Smoke-Wagon

Video.summary: A young doctor (David Alpert) faces a moral dilemma when asked to treat the escaped convict (Gregg Barton) who killed his father (Stanley Andrews).
Video.title: Diablo Doctor

Video.summary: Annie (Gail Davis) investigates when a young dance teacher has a seemingly ironclad alibi for a series of crimes. With Lou Smith, Sue Smith.
Video.title: Trigger Twins

Video.summary: The agents travel to Central City to investigate the disappearance of two Postal Inspectors.
Video.title: Empty Mailbags

Video.summary: Kate tries to restore the self-confidence of Floyd Smoot after he is jilted by his mail-order sweetheart, by pretending to be in love with him.
Video.title: The Courtship of Floyd Smoot

Video.summary: Curtis breaks the throttle of the Cannonball and blocks the way to Kate's jamboree.
Video.title: Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?

Image.alt: Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?
Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?
Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?
Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?
Is There a Doctor in the Roundhouse?

Video.summary: An injured rancher summons all his strength to help Annie and Lofty when outlaws hold his wife hostage.
Video.title: Hard Luck Ranch

Video.summary: Tagg (Jimmy Hawkins) and his friend Billy (Stuffy Singer) run away to a ghost town inhabited by an outlaw gang. With Gail Davis.
Video.title: The Runaways

Video.summary: Matt must restore order to a town controlled by outlaws.
Video.title: Hangfire

Video.summary: Pat and Stoney investigate a land title dispute.
Video.title: Hush Money

Video.summary: Pat and Stoney investigate the closing of a government silver mine.
Video.title: Ghost Town Mystery
